fields.label_vwap_5s: 1 if settlement_price_vwap_5s > entry_price_vwap_5s else 0; missing if either side missing
fields.is_primary_reliable_sample: Configured reliability rule requiring reliable entry/settlement overlap minutes, non-boundary minutes, valid primary VWAP, valid kline open, and exact 60-minute horizon.
fields.entry_price_vwap_1s: entry minute vwap_first_1s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.settlement_price_vwap_1s: settlement minute vwap_first_1s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.label_vwap_1s: 1 if settlement_price_vwap_1s > entry_price_vwap_1s else 0; missing if either side missing
fields.entry_price_vwap_2s: entry minute vwap_first_2s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.settlement_price_vwap_2s: settlement minute vwap_first_2s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.label_vwap_2s: 1 if settlement_price_vwap_2s > entry_price_vwap_2s else 0; missing if either side missing
fields.entry_price_vwap_5s: entry minute vwap_first_5s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.settlement_price_vwap_5s: settlement minute vwap_first_5s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.entry_price_vwap_10s: entry minute vwap_first_10s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.settlement_price_vwap_10s: settlement minute vwap_first_10s from Stage 2B left-closed/right-open window
fields.label_vwap_10s: 1 if settlement_price_vwap_10s > entry_price_vwap_10s else 0; missing if either side missing

notes: All joins use integer millisecond timestamps.
No model features, train/test split, or model outputs are created in Stage 3A.
